title: Petco (WOOF) Q2 Earnings Report Preview: What To Look For
text: Petco (WOOF) Q2 Earnings Preview. Key Expectations: Analysts anticipate Petco's Q2 revenue will remain flat year-over-year at approximately $1.52 billion, representing a slowdown from the 3.4% growth recorded in the same period last year. The company is expected to report an adjusted loss of -$0.03 per share. Recent Performance: In Q1, Petco exceeded revenue projections by 1.1%, delivering $1.53 billion in sales, though this reflected a 1.7% year-over-year decline. The company provided optimistic earnings guidance for the next quarter and achieved strong earnings estimate beats. Analyst Sentiment: Most analysts tracking the company have reaffirmed their estimates within the past month, suggesting confidence in the company's trajectory. However, Petco has missed Wall Street's revenue expectations twice over the previous two years. Stock Performance: The stock has appreciated 29.3% over the past month and trades near its analyst price target of $3.20 (current price: $2.96).
